title: 30PCS Fly Paper Strips, TRIITECH Sticky Fly Ribbons Traps, Tape Trap Ribbons for Indoor and Outdoor
bullet_points: 【Package Includes】Containing 30 packs of fly paper, which is enough for you to use and can reduce the impact of flying insects on the comfort of your home.
【Non-toxic and Odorless】No chemicals and use high-quality waterproof paper and non-toxic and odorless strong glue, which is not only harmless to humans and pets, but also can effectively control

【Easy to Use】Just slowly pull out the red thread of the tube and twist gently to unfold the fly paper. They are sticky on both sides, peel them off when full and throw them in the trash. Easy to use and no
【Quality Fly Catcher】Our Fly sticky paper great for capturing aphids, leaf miner, fungus gnat strips, thrips, white flies, black flies, midges, mosquitoes, and other fruit flies.

【Wide Application】You can place the fly trap in your living room, hotel, ranch, kitchen, and anywhere else flies bother you. It's also great for use in closets, basements, garages, storage areas, utility areas, attics, storage boats, storage RVs, and Other non-residential spaces.
